_comment: Tier-1 regression-replay monitor. Copy to heartbeat-tasks/regression-replay-monitor.json to activate. Generates a plist via heartbeat-tasks/scripts/generate-plist.py.
description: Watches commits for changes to files that affect retrieval, dispatch, or context. When detected, runs tier-1 structural-metrics check across all pinned regression-replay seeds. Deterministic — no LLM calls. Cold-start: first run records current HEAD; subsequent runs detect commits since.
